title: wollastonia integrifolia
intro: Wollastonia integrifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the smooth buttonbush. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Wollastonia integrifolia is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used to make infusions for medicinal purposes.
